name: library-system-tests
description: A BDD test library to validate Login and Catalogu Page

scripts.test:headed: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS=false NODE_ENV=test npx cucumber-js --require-module ./src/config/ts-node-register.js --require 'src/**/*.ts' --format progress --publish-quiet
scripts.report: mkdir -p reports && npx multiple-cucumber-html-reporter --source reports/cucumber.json --target reports/cucumber-report --name "Library System Test Report" --displayDuration
